narrative: Network egress is blocked in this execution environment: both api.coingecko.com and app.zyte.com return "Host not in allowlist" from the proxy, so live price and news feeds cannot be reached. This is the second consecutive run with the same block — the underlying network policy needs to be updated to allow egress to these hosts before monitoring can resume.
worth_watching: Whitelist api.coingecko.com in the network policy to restore BTC/ETH/SOL prices
Whitelist app.zyte.com and storage.scrapinghub.com to resume news collection from coindesk_com spider
Whitelist api.resend.com to re-enable email delivery of the daily brief
